channel.title: Princeton Data Commons RSS Feed
channel.description: Princeton Data Commons RSS Feed of draft DOIs

item.title: One dimensional gyrokinetic study of a low-recycling scrape-off layer.
Data for "Resilience of renewable power systems under climate risks"
Data for: "Transfer Learning Meets Embedded Correlated Wavefunction Theory for Chemically Accurate Molecular Simulations: Application to Calcium Carbonate Ion-Pairing"
Data for "Iron-Catalyzed Cross-[2 + 2] Cycloaddition of Butadiene and α,ω-Dienes for Ductile and Chemically Recyclable Poly(oligocyclobutanes)"
Data for "A MINi Powder INjector (MINPIN) for the SMART tokamak"
Data for "Machine Learning Methods to Fit Interatomic Potentials for Plasma-Surface Interactions"
Methane, nitrous oxide, and ammonia emissions from wastewater treatment plants (Moore et al., Nature Water, 2025)
Date for "Dynamics of Argon Metastables in Ar-CH4 Radio Frequency Capacitively-Coupled Plasma: Real-Time Monitoring with Neural Network-Augmented Broadband Optical Emission Spectroscopy"
Data from "Development of a Deep Potential Model for F and CF2 Etching of Si and SiO2"
